description:
Legal document(s) in Arabic script. 

Recto: Acknowledgment made by Najm b. Naḥrīr the 'mawlā' of Suʿadāʾ(?) bt. al-Ḥasan b. Muḥammad al-ʿAlawī(?) b. al-ʿAbbāsī(?) and Hilāl [...] b. al-ʿAlawī(?) b. al-ʿAbbāsī(?) and Muẓaffar b. Madkhūr the tailor, acting as agent for his wife Mulk/Malak. Dating: mentions the years 409 and 410 AH = ca. 1018–20 CE. Further down mentions real estate and various names (e.g., [...] b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlī Ibn Ṭabāṭabā and payments. Essentially an acknowledgement document, but mentions tax-related terminologies like jibāya, ḍamān al-darak, zakāt, and also barāʾa. There are some annotations on the verso, referring to the deed on recto, and one line in a thick pen. Needs further examination to understand the content.

Verso: Addendum, possibly in the hand of the same scribe, and referring repeatedly to the original document on recto. Reporting that the husband of Ḥuml(?) bt. Naḥrīr the mawlā of Suʿadāʾ etc. collected on behalf of his wife a certain sum of money. Dated: 8 Rabīʿ I 410 AH. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
